subsections.text: Each planning organization shall develop its own project recommendation criteria, which must include consideration of:
projected improvements to congestion and safety;
projected effects on economic development opportunities for residents of the region;
effects on the environment, including air quality;
socioeconomic effects, including disproportionately high and adverse health or environmental effects on minority or low-income neighborhoods; and
any other factors deemed appropriate by the planning organization.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 314 (H.B.20), Sec. 4, eff. June 3, 2015.
